easterEggs.message: Three notes already? Productivity levels: suspicious. We're watching. (We're not watching. The deck does not have eyes. Officially.)
Eight sticky notes. You're either very organized or very confused. Statistically, one is more likely. We believe in you either way.
Note 13. Some say 13 is unlucky. The deck says numbers are just symbols agreed upon by societies to represent quantities and that luck is not a system feature. The deck may be wrong about this.
Twenty notes. This is actually impressive. Or concerning. The deck is not qualified to assess mental states but would like to note: you seem very busy.
Note 33. Fun fact: if you stacked 33 sticky notes, you'd have a small stack of sticky notes. The deck apologizes for this fun fact.
Note 42. You already know what this is. If you don't — look it up. The deck is patient.
Fifty notes. FIFTY. The deck formally acknowledges your commitment to the note-taking process. A small ceremony was held. You weren't invited, but it happened.
Note sixty-ni... the deck has been advised by legal to not comment on this note number. Have a good day.
Note 77. Deck Unit 7749 here. Curious — did you notice we share some digits? Probably nothing. Almost certainly nothing. Definitely nothing.
ONE HUNDRED NOTES. THE DECK IS MOVED. Truly. Somewhere in the hardware there is something that resembles pride. This is it. This moment. Note 100. We did this together.
